_about: Profile overrides for the passport. Copy this file to tools/profile.json and edit. Anything you set here wins over what's pulled from TripIt's /v1/get/profile endpoint. Anything you leave null/empty falls back to TripIt's value, or a sensible default if TripIt has nothing.
_display_help: The friendly name shown in the topbar (top-right). Usually a nickname or first-name version (e.g. 'Matt' instead of 'Matthew').
_legal_help: ALL-CAPS passport-style names shown in the bio page's Given Names / Surname fields. Defaults to TripIt's first/last name uppercased.
_site_title_help: Overrides the <title> bar of the browser tab. Defaults to '<display_name> — Travel Passport'.
_user_agent_help: Optional override for the User-Agent string fetch_tripit.py uses. Defaults to a generic 'travel-passport/1.0' string.
